title: androsace integra
intro: Androsace integra, also known as the Himalayan rock jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Androsace integra is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of capsules and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies.
